title: Assistant Professor (Electrical and Computer Engineering)
description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS Career Portal

Your application will be processed only if you apply via NUS Career Portal

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


Job Description

The Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) at the National University of Singapore (NUS) is seeking a candidate at the rank of Assistant Professor (Tenure Track) in the area of microelectronics devices and technologies. The candidate is expected lead active and externally funded research program and collaborative research with colleagues in other disciplines to address challenges that achieve scientific and societal impact are encouraged. Besides research, the candidate is also expected to contribute actively to teaching and service roles at the Department, College, or University level.

Interested applicants are invited to submit a detailed CV, a teaching philosophy statement, list of publications, statement of research interests and plans, contact details of at least 3 referees, and the NUS Personal Data Consent for Job Applicants.

Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a campus visit and interview. Applications will be accepted until the available position is filled.

Qualifications

The successful candidate must have an earned doctorate in Electrical Engineering and/or Computer Engineering or an allied field. Candidates must have an established track record in research.

Company Overview

NUS is a leading worldwide ranked University with a strong commitment to education and research. It ranks amongst the top 10 universities in Asia. ECE is one of the largest departments at NUS, with over 70 tenure-track, educator-track, and practice track faculty, and more than 2400 undergraduate, masters, and doctoral students. The department is ranked among the world’s top 10 in the QS World University Rankings by Subject 2022. We invite you to explore https://cde.nus.edu.sg/ece/ to learn more about us and see how you could become a part of our vibrant and diverse community.

postedCompany.description:
The National University of Singapore aspires to be a vital community of academics, researchers, staff, students and alumni working together in a spirit of innovation and enterprise for a better world.

 

Our singular focus on talent will be the cornerstone of a truly great university that is dedicated to quality education, influential research and visionary enterprise, in service of country and society.
